mapper.select:
SELECT C.CUST_ID, C.CUST_NM, C.CUST_KN, C.CUST_PHONE, C.CUST_ADDRESS, C.CUST_INFOR_SECURITY, C.CUST_DISPATCH, M.MANAGER_NM FROM CUST_TBL C LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MANAGER_CUST_ID, GROUP_CONCAT( MANAGER_NM ORDER BY MANAGER_CD, MANAGER_CHRCD SEPARATOR '、' ) AS MANAGER_NM FROM MANG_TBL GROUP BY MANAGER_CUST_ID ) M ON M.MANAGER_CUST_ID = C.CUST_ID WHERE
ORDER BY C.CUST_NM LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CUST_TBL C WHERE
